MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Philip
Tam. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Nicole Jackson Matthews is present.
Attorney Matthew A. Tolve representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Andy Westley, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-28-2011 is vacated.
